SoDEX - Decentralized Exchange

Trade cryptocurrencies on our decentralized orderbook exchange powered by ValueChain.

Available Trading Pairs

BTC/USDC, ETH/USDC, and other major cryptocurrency pairs for spot and futures markets.

Key Features

Real-time market data, limit and market orders, transparent on-chain settlement, and self-custody of assets.

Getting Started

Connect your wallet, deposit funds, and start trading with our intuitive interface.
